# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.x     | ✅ |
| < 1.0   | ❌ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

ReviewPilot runs **100% locally** — your code never leaves your machine. However, if you discover a security vulnerability in the tool itself, please report it privately.

**Do not** open a public issue. Instead, email the maintainer directly or open a [security advisory](https://github.com/Sensei7708/reviewpilot/security/advisories/new).

We'll respond within 48 hours and work on a fix before disclosing publicly.
